gaps.description: M1: Remote profiles from CDN with local cache
M1: Basic HTTP REST API (POST /api/chat with SSE streaming)
M1: Web UI minimal chat dialog (Vue ChatBox)
M1: One-click install script (npx agentic-service via bin)
M2: Web UI voice controls (push-to-talk button, VAD auto-detect)
M3: WebSocket device registration and heartbeat
M3: Device tools: speak(device), display(device), capture(device)
M3: Admin panel (device list, logs, config UI)
M4: Cloud fallback (auto-switch to OpenAI/Anthropic when local is slow/fails)
M4: Config hot-update (auto re-recommend model when remote profiles update)
